title: lyonia squamulosa
intro: Lyonia squamulosa, also known as the swamp sweetbay or fetid sweetbay, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lyonia squamulosa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lyonia squamulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
